market_pulse: Competitive activity across Strip venues shows strong DJ lineup announcements. OMNIA leading with Pauly D/Fisher bookings, Zouk securing RL Grime residency (Apr 24-25), while XS maintains steady positioning. LIV ecosystem shows solid guest list promoter activity and dayclub focus. Weekend readiness ramping up as April midpoint approaches.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, XS, Encore actively using countdown/teaser Stories for upcoming events. LIV minimal Story countdown activity detected.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Increase Story countdown cadence for weekend DJs; tease artist announcements 5-7 days prior like competitors

content_gaps.description: Zouk and OMNIA actively reposting guest TikToks and reels. LIV relying primarily on official content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create guest post hashtag campaign; incentivize attendee content reposting to expand organic reach

content_gaps.description: No evidence of Instagram Live DJ sets or TikTok Live streams from LIV properties. Competitors leveraging these formats.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Pilot Instagram Live DJ set 30min pre-event; use for promo giveaways
